title: TRANSPORTATION - 211info
text: CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER TRANSPORTATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers private and non-emergency medical transportation services. 1114 SW Frazer Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Low-income households, adults with disabilities, or age 55 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 276-1130 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 276-1130 Main phone Main phone (541) 276-1130 Intake (877) 875-4657 Ride Scheduling Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule a ride. Same-day service may be possible if scheduling allows, but calling 48 hours in advance to schedule a ride is preferred to guarantee availability. FEES: Medical Transportation: None Private Transportation: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Eastern Oregon Coordinated Care Organization (EOCCO) information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of SW 12th and Frazer. Services: General Paratransit/Community Ride Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions General Paratransit/Community Ride Programs * Older Adults Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS INFORMATION SERVICES - DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER
